# Vela Intelligence
# https://getvela.email

Vela is a modern AI email client designed for speed, clarity, and focus. It sits on top of your existing Gmail account to provide a lightweight, incredibly fast email workflow.

## Key Features
- **AI-Powered Inbox:** Summarize long email threads instantly and reply using contextual AI models trained specifically on email correspondence.
- **Privacy First:** We don't serve ads and we don't sell data. LLM providers used by Vela adhere to strict zero-retention policies.
- **Speed & Design:** Vela boasts perceived interactions under 100ms with a clean, distraction-free interface inspired by modern notes apps.
- **Command Palette (Cmd+K):** Navigate your inbox, search emails, and ask the AI questions using a quick keyboard shortcut.
- **Markdown Composer:** Write emails easily using markdown syntax for structured and beautiful messages.

## Pricing
- **Free Plan:** Perfect for casual use. Includes standard inbox features and basic AI summarization with a limited monthly usage allowance.
- **Pro Plan:** $8/month. Offers up to 30x higher AI usage, multiple email accounts, split inboxes, and advanced AI composer tools.

## Organization
Vela Email
Website: https://getvela.email
Contact: Support available within the app.
